title: AudioEffect
description: Abstract base for all insertable audio effects in ExoJS. Each effect exposes stable inputNode and outputNode AudioNodes that an AudioBus or Voice connects into the Web Audio graph. Async effects (e.g., worklet-based) expose a ready promise that resolves once the effect is fully initialized.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Abstract base for all insertable audio effects in ExoJS. Each effect exposes stable inputNode and outputNode AudioNodes that an AudioBus or Voice connects into the Web Audio graph. Async effects (e.g., worklet-based) expose a ready promise that resolves once the effect is fully initialized.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Disconnects all audio nodes and releases resources. Must be called when the effect is no longer needed.

members.name: inputNode
members.description: The node where audio enters this effect.

members.name: outputNode
members.description: The node where audio exits this effect.

members.name: ready
members.description: Resolves when the effect is fully initialized. Defaults to immediately-resolved for sync effects.
